introSection: Tornado, originally known as Bobs, was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Coney Island in Brooklyn, New York, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened in 1926 as Bobs. It was renamed to Thunderbolt circa 1933.

The ride was damaged by a series of fire in late 1977 and did not reopen. It was demolished in April 1978.

fullText:
Tornado, originally known as Bobs, was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Coney Island in Brooklyn, New York, USA.

The ride opened in 1926 as Bobs. It was renamed to Thunderbolt circa 1933.

The ride was damaged by a series of fire in late 1977 and did not reopen. It was demolished in April 1978.
